strengths: Strong Google Business Profile rating (4.9 with 36 reviews)

weaknesses: Missing FAQ section on the website

Opportunity to improve H1 and H2 tags for better keyword targeting

Optimize H1 and H2 tags with targeted keywords to improve search visibility

strengths: High customer rating indicating strong service quality

recommendations: Actively engage with customer reviews by responding to feedback
Encourage more customer reviews to build social proof
Add more visual content to the GBP to enhance engagement

issues: Only basic JSON-LD schema is implemented

recommendations: Implement service-specific schema markup for each HVAC service offered

Use schema markup to highlight customer reviews and ratings
Leverage AI-driven content generation to create more dynamic and engaging content
